about_us.paragraph:
Arhi Games is a small, little games studio. I really enjoy programming, especially low level stuff with C++. I also really love developing games, making the large core systems which I can than use without having to touch code every again while also having in mind the performance aspect of the game, which UE5 makes me very difficult.
As I'm still in school, I do all off this stuff in my free time after school or on the weekends, but the best time to make progress is vacation time :)!

commercial_projects.paragraph: These are all the projects I completely finished and released on a major platform. Also, I'm currently developing a new, large game which I want to release when I become 18 years old, in 2028.

ultimanex.name: Ultima Nex
ultimanex.description: What started as a small practice project to practice my multiplayer-programming skills with UE5, turned into a full steam release quickly... This is currently the project I'm most proud on, because I really think this is a good game.

arhitodo.name: ArhiTodo
arhitodo.description: As I needed a tool to plan my feature projects, I wrote this tool, a custom Kanban-Style Todo Application. Special to this Todo App is that all the features are useful features, not just random features thrown into the app.

kitchenquest.name: Kitchen Quest
kitchenquest.description: This project started as a practice project too. I really do like the idea of the game and would like the game to be much better, but you can feel that I was pretty young when I created this game, and I can see it in the code too... :(

findtheway.name: FindTheWay
findtheway.description: This was my first release I ever did. This game actually started as a practice project too, but my father recommended to try to publish this game for mobile stores, and here we are now. And I genuinely think this is a pretty fun game, especially considering my age back then.
